---
title: "ranef"
generated: true
description: "Random-effect modes (BLUPs) of a fitted mixed model."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme`](../nitrix-stats-lme.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats.lme._blup`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ranef -->
```python
ranef(result: Any) -> Float[Array, 'V q r']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ranef -->
Random-effect modes (BLUPs) of a fitted mixed model.

Returns the per-level modes $b_g$ stored on the result -- `(V, q)`
for a scalar random intercept, `(V, q, r)` for a random slope.  Available
on a [`GLMMResult`](../nitrix-stats.qmd) (always) and on an LME result fitted
with [`lme_fit`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml/lme_fit.qmd) under `retain_blups=True`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ranef -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `Any` | — | — | A fitted mixed-model result carrying a `blups` attribute -- a [`GLMMResult`](../nitrix-stats.qmd), or an LME result fitted with `retain_blups=True`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `V` × `q` × `r`. The per-element, per-group random-effect modes $b_g$ -- `(V, q)` for a scalar random intercept, `(V, q, r)` for a random slope.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ranef -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `q` | random-effect columns |
| `r` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
